name: Cheese-Cherry-Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Salad Oil (olive or vegetable oil)
recipeInstructions:
Crust: In a pie plate, mix flour, salt, and sugar together. In a measuring cup, combine milk with oil and stir until well blended. Add the milk mixture to the flour mixture all at once and stir with a fork until damp. Use your fingers to spread the dough evenly over the pie plate. Prick the surface of the dough several times with a fork.
Filling: Place cottage cheese in a blender and blend until smooth. Mix in sour cream, beaten eggs, sugar, and cornstarch until well combined. Spread the filling over the crust and bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 50 minutes. Allow to cool before spreading the pie filling on top and refrigerating until serving. This is a low-fat version of cheesecake that you can also make with blueberry pie filling if desired. Recipe from my mother-in-law in Ohio.
Note: The attribution line has been removed as per the instructions.
